summary: Tested Staff Email + Mobile OTP 2FA login feature. Backend: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Staff Login correctly shows 'Email + OTP' as primary login method (default selected)
Step indicator '1 Email → 2 Mobile OTP' is visible and functional
API POST /api/staff/login-email-2fa correctly returns require_otp:true with phone and mobile_last4
API POST /api/staff/verify-email-2fa correctly completes login and returns staff data with token
Rate limiting (429) is active on login endpoints - security feature working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Staff Email + Mobile OTP 2FA login flow fully tested and working. Test staff: test_4852d8cc@asr.com (ASR1002). The old Staff ID + Password login has been replaced with Email + OTP as primary method.
